response:
the fare starts at ten yuan for the first four kilometers of travel.
each extra kilometer costs two yuan more than the base rate.
this rule applies when the distance exceeds the initial four kilometer limit.
spring arrives in the city and brings fresh air to the streets.
spring also brings more travelers who need rides to their hotels.

the total distance includes both driving and converted stopping time minutes.
fifteen kilometers of driving plus extra time equals the final fare amount.
thirty eight yuan means the total distance was exactly twenty two kilometers.
the driver must have stopped for at most twenty minutes during the trip.
any longer stop would increase the fare beyond the amount paid.
